LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VINTAGE POINT, LLC'S UNOPPOSED APPLICATION FOR A RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF POST A $10,000 UNDERTAKING, WHICH IS REQUIRED BY STATUTE NOTWITHSTANDING THE PARTIES' CONTRARY AGREEMENT. (CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 489.220; SEE VERSHBOW V. REINER (1991) 231 CAL.APP.3D 879, 882 [WRIT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED WITHOUT THE MANDATED BOND IS VOID].) COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF VINTAGE POINT, LLC'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Plaintiff Vintage Point, LLC's unopposed application for a right to attach order and order for issuance of writ of attachment is granted on the condition that Plaintiff post a $10,000 undertaking, which is required by statute notwithstanding the parties' contrary agreement. (Code Civ. Proc. sec. 489.220; see Vershbow v. Reiner (1991) 231 Cal.App.3d 879, 882 [writ of attachment issued without the mandated bond is void].)

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
